ingredients_text:
Noodles 90% (_whear_ flour, sunflower oil (17%), modified starch, salt, sugar, rapeseed oil, tumeric extract),
Seasoning powder 10% (iodised salt, flavour enhancers (monosodium glutamate, disodium inosinate, disodium guanylate), mineral potassium salt, flavourings, starch, sugar, leek 2.1%, cayenne pepper 2%, chicken meat 2%, palm fat, lovage root, parsley leaf 1.1%, chicken fat 0.9%, ginger, garlic, paprika, salt, pepper 0.4%, turmeric, acid (citric acid), syrup caramel, antioxidant (rosemary extracts))
product_name: Spicy chicken noodle soup with Chilli
